mnemonics.title: Five IoT Device Components
mnemonics.content: **SAMCP:** Sensor, Actuator, Microcontroller, Communication module, Power system — Remember: "Sensors And MCUs Communicate Powerfully"

mnemonics.title: Wireless Technologies by Range (short → long)
mnemonics.content: **N-B-Z-W-L-C:** NFC, Bluetooth, Zigbee, Wi-Fi, LoRa, Cellular — Remember: "Never Bring Zebras When Lions Chase"

mnemonics.title: Three IoT Device Categories
mnemonics.content: **CIG:** Constrained (RFID, basic sensors) → Intermediate (wearables, smart home) → Gateway (RPi, bridges to cloud) — complexity and processing power increase left to right.

mnemonics.title: Four Power Management Techniques
mnemonics.content: **SDEP:** Sleep modes, Duty cycling, Energy-efficient protocols, Power gating — Remember: "Sleep During Every Pause"
